creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Zane C. Bowers-Hadley from comment #4)

> It was intended as a test to see if would be smart enough to see if would figure out it can pull the repo containing the I386 stuff. Pkg is not.

So?

> Also I am using everything from Poudriere. The issue is the script does not work if you are using Poudriere as you are not going to have the desired binaries in that repo.

Naturally. You want i386 binaries, you need to build them.

> This is very much not a issue with the script as it by no means is capable of working.
> Also it offers no means to specify what repo is being pulled etc.
> So lets not pretend this script is not broken in it's current setup.

It was tested on dozens of real people. I'm going to pretend it works as much I want to, thank you.
